history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with short, dark, tousled hair takes a selfie in a dimly lit room. They are wearing a black t-shirt and have small silver hoop earrings in each ear. Their facial expression is a mix of a grimace and a squint, with their eyes partially closed and their brow furrowed. They are holding a black smartphone in their right hand, angled to capture their reflection in a mirror. The background is blurred and dark, but appears to be a room with shelves and various objects on a table or counter to the left, including what looks like a white appliance and some bottles. The lighting is dramatic, with harsh shadows and highlights, suggesting a single light source from the front or side. The overall color palette is dark and moody, dominated by blacks, grays, and muted tones. The style is candid and intimate, capturing a moment of self-reflection or perhaps a playful pose.
